name: gamma
description: Networked multiplayer party game framework — phone controllers + shared display

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=server && npm install --workspace=client/app
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client/app"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client/app
